name: Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi
summary: Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi engages in purchasing, selling, importing, and exporting petroleum and petroleum products, fuel oil, diesel oil, LPG, and liquid fuel in Turkey. The company operates through Facility Leasing and Hotel Management segments. It is also involved in purchasing, selling, and leasing movable and immovable properties and machinery fixtures. The company was formerly known as Merkez B Tipi Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi AS and changed its name to Avrasya Petrol ve Turistik Tesisler Yatirimlar Anonim Sirketi in January 2011. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
